name: scratchtml
description: Review, share and discuss Claude Code plans on scratchtml. Plans are uploaded for inline review before exiting plan mode; revisions carry a changes-from-review section; Claude can reply to reviewers' comments; share/get/list commands included.

plan_review.title: Plan review
plan_review.description: Review plans on scratchtml before exiting plan mode (every plan, across permission modes).

auto_open.title: Auto-open in browser
auto_open.description: Open uploaded plans in the browser automatically (local sessions only).

approve_mode.title: Approval mode
approve_mode.description: 'ask' shows the built-in approval dialog after review; 'auto' approves reviewed plans automatically in auto mode.

ui_mockups.title: UI mockups in plans
ui_mockups.description: Encourages Claude to include inline HTML/CSS/SVG mockups to illustrate UI layout ideas in plans.

diagrams.title: Mermaid diagrams in plans
diagrams.description: Encourages Claude to use mermaid fences for flows and architecture diagrams (rendered on scratchtml).
